bird.name: 普通鳴冠雉
bird.summary: 普通鳴冠雉（学名：Pipile pipile），又名鳴官鳥、鳴冠雉，是一種鳳冠雉。 特徵 普通鳴冠雉主要是黑色，有紫色光澤。牠們的冠大而呈黑色，邊緣白色。雙翼上有大片白色。面部沒有羽毛，垂肉藍色，腳紅色。

relations.subject: 普通鳴冠雉
relations.evidence: It is threatened by illegal hunting and to a lesser extent by habitat destruction
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 普通鳴冠雉
relations.evidence: It is threatened by illegal hunting and to a lesser extent by habitat destruction
relations.object_summary: 直接捕杀或非法贸易导致种群下降。

relations.subject: 普通鳴冠雉
relations.evidence: It is threatened by illegal hunting and to a lesser extent by habitat destruction
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
